intro: Neomanniophyton ikelembense is a medicinal plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, commonly known as "Ikelemba" or "Tree of Life", which refers to its diverse array of medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Neomanniophyton ikelembense include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Amazonian medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and digestive issues.
